selection.reason: No active continuity_mining item existed; selected the highest-priority unresolved handoff from completed M-001 and CM-0010: define a canonical promotion record without rewriting completed history.

memory_recovered: Handoff-derived work requires an additive, provenance-bound authorization record; the completed source item must remain immutable and linked rather than reopened.

claim_states.observed: Completed M-001 has a handoff but there is no active continuity-owned queue item.
claim_states.inferred: Prose handoffs alone cannot safely carry execution authority.
claim_states.proposed: Adopt the new schema for future handoff promotion records.
claim_states.superseded: Reopening completed items or silently treating handoffs as active work.
claim_states.unresolved: Runtime schema validation and ACTIVE_QUEUE promotion_id linkage remain unimplemented.

verification.json_parse: GitHub accepted and returned the UTF-8 JSON artifact; semantic runtime validation not yet implemented.

next_action: Implement a deterministic validator plus one authorized and one rejected promotion fixture, then add an optional promotion_id link to future queue records without modifying completed source items.
